macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Indian Sensex and Nifty Close Higher Ahead of FOMC Meeting
items.summary: Sensex rose 0.75% to 76,070.84 and Nifty gained 0.74% to 23,581.15, led by gains in capital goods, telecom, auto, and banking sectors while FMCG and IT lagged. Markets expect range-bound trading on March 18 with focus on FOMC decision.

items.title: US Stock Futures Decline in Early Trading
items.summary: Dow futures fell 0.22%, S&P 500 futures dropped 0.30%, and Nasdaq futures declined 0.39%, with Dow E-minis down 104 points amid cautious sentiment.

items.title: US Markets End Slightly Higher; European Indices Gain
items.summary: Dow Jones closed up 0.13% at 47,030.54, S&P 500 rose 0.27% to 6,739.22, and Nasdaq gained 0.48% to 22,507.86. European markets like FTSE 100 (+0.67%) and DAX (+0.17%) also advanced.

items.title: Indian Markets Anticipate Flat-to-Positive Open with Global Support
items.summary: Gift Nifty at 23,552 (-0.07%) signals steady start; India VIX drops 8.39% to 19.79, supported by positive European cues and momentum in banking stocks.

items.title: Nvidia Sees $1 Trillion in Orders for Blackwell and Rubin Chips
items.summary: Hyperscalers are pouring hundreds of billions into AI, with 90% of the trillion-dollar buildout spending ending up in Asia, driving next-gen tech outside the US.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Mastercard Acquires Stablecoin Startup BVNK for $1.8 Billion
items.summary: Mastercard has acquired stablecoin infrastructure provider BVNK for $1.8 billion, marking a major push into digital assets amid favorable regulatory shifts post-Trump re-election. The deal highlights growing traditional finance interest in stablecoins, which are handling billions in monthly transactions.

items.title: KuCoin Announces Delisting of 18 Tokens on March 18, 2026
items.summary: KuCoin will delist 18 cryptocurrency tokens at 08:00 UTC on March 18, 2026, with withdrawals closing on April 17. Users are advised to withdraw holdings promptly to avoid losses.

items.title: FOMC March 2026 Meeting Looms Over Crypto Markets
items.summary: The Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting on March 17-18, 2026, is expected to influence Bitcoin near $75K-$76K resistance and broader crypto sentiment. A hawkish stance could pressure prices, while dovish signals might drive Bitcoin toward $90K-$100K.

items.title: TRON's Justin Sun to Keynote at DC Blockchain Summit 2026
items.summary: Justin Sun will deliver a virtual keynote at the DC Blockchain Summit 2026 in Washington D.C. on March 18, spotlighting TRON's role in blockchain development.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Unveils Major AI and Robotics Advancements
items.summary: NVIDIA announced key developments including physical AI for over 110 robots, partnerships with ABB, Universal Robots, Caterpillar, and T-Mobile for humanoid and industrial robotics, Disney's Olaf robot using reinforcement learning and Newton physics engine co-developed with Google DeepMind, robo-taxi integrations with BYD, Hyundai, Nissan, and Uber, agentic AI tools like OpenClaw and NemoClaw, DLSS 5 with neuro rendering, and a new high-efficiency data center CPU.

items.title: Oracle Announces GPU-Accelerated AI Database Advances with NVIDIA at GTC 2026
items.summary: Oracle launched general availability of GPU-accelerated vector index generation in Oracle AI Database 26ai using NVIDIA hardware and cuVS, plus a reference implementation for cost-efficient enterprise AI agents integrating Open Agent Specification and NVIDIA NeMo Agent Toolkit.

items.title: University of Minnesota Develops Knowledge-Guided ML for Superior Flood Forecasting
items.summary: New studies show a hybrid knowledge-guided machine learning model improves flood prediction accuracy over traditional physics-based methods by automatically learning from watershed data, eliminating manual recalibration, with potential for real-time operational use.

items.title: Study Reveals Top AI Coding Tools Err One in Four Times on Structured Outputs
items.summary: University of Waterloo research benchmarks 11 LLMs on structured outputs like JSON and XML, finding even advanced models achieve only 75% accuracy while open-source ones hit 65%, emphasizing need for human oversight in software development.

items.title: Google Prepares for Cross-Enterprise AI Agents with Zero-Trust Security
items.summary: Google Cloud outlines transition to multi-agent AI systems spanning enterprises, requiring zero-trust identity verification, digital passports, continuous learning, and new security for actions across boundaries amid shifting regulations.

items.title: Deloitte Releases Paper on Physical AI Transforming Industrial Operations
items.summary: Deloitte's new paper 'Physical AI: The moment of acceleration' details how PAI will power smart manufacturing and industrial transformation.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Orange Business Summit 2026 Launches New Tech Solutions Including Drone Guardian and Live Collaboration
items.summary: Orange Business unveiled four new enterprise solutions at its Summit on March 17-18, 2026, featuring Europe's first anti-drone as-a-Service (Orange Drone Guardian) and a sovereign collaboration suite (Live Collaboration) for secure cloud-based messaging, video, and document tools.

items.title: Precor and Peloton Debut Integrated Commercial Business Unit at HFA 2026
items.summary: Precor | Peloton announced the first public demonstration of their combined Commercial Business Unit at HFA 2026 (March 17-18), integrating commercial engineering, connected fitness tech, and immersive content for operators.

items.title: Interactive Strength (TRNR) Showcases Four Fitness Brands at HFA 2026 After Ergatta Acquisition
items.summary: Interactive Strength, operating premium fitness brands including newly acquired Ergatta alongside Wattbike, CLMBR, and FORME, will exhibit all four at HFA 2026 with leadership presence, following recent $6.4M settlement and >$30M 2026 revenue guidance.

items.title: Micron Technology Earnings Preview: Wedbush Sets $500 Target Amid HBM Demand Surge
items.summary: Ahead of Micron's March 18 earnings, Wedbush raised its price target to $500, highlighting Micron's lead in High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) supply for advanced processors, decoupling from traditional PC/smartphone volatility.
